## Type of change

- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm test` pass locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior or the `.cem` format changed
- [ ] Follows Conventional Commits in the PR title

## Compliance

- [ ] This change does **not** modify, patch, reverse-engineer, intercept or otherwise interfere
      with Claude Code or any Anthropic software. It only uses documented local files and supported
      mechanisms.
